claims.statement: DET6-TITLE: STAGE_TITLES_LOCALIZED now carries the five world-bible beat names (en+ko); browser E2E asserted '1 / 5 — The Bell Beneath Blackwater' on encounter 1 and the headless smoke verified the ko toggle ('블랙워터 아래의 종'). Design audit Finding 1 resolved.

DET6-FOE (telegraph revision): void-spawn waves spawn at charge-cycle start (N=1/1/2/2/3 by encounter), march left at 100/foeCooldown %/s so arrival coincides with the attack, survivors clear at wrap, and a successful counter dispels the wave (300ms unit-dispel). E2E observed a hostile during charge (foeCharge=0.1, before resolution) and the desktop screenshot shows the monitor hostile row (Void Spawn INBOUND, red border) with the ACTIVE|HOSTILE tally. Findings 2 resolved as a readable pre-attack threat, not aftermath.

DET6-UNIT: DISRUPT now fields an Arcane Disruptor lane unit (sprite unit_disrupt.png, speed preset*1.15) and RECOVER pulses an 800ms emerald recover-pulse aura on the knight avatar. E2E stage-2 counter response recorded {countered:true, hostiles:0, disruptors:1} — dispel-on-counter plus disruptor fielding verified in one observation. Finding 3 resolved.

DET6-QA: stage1-vertical-slice 2/2, playtest-5-stages PASS, full browser E2E exit 0 unfiltered (5/5 VICTORY, lane-click, hostile-telegraph and disrupt-counter asserts, settlement 10 fragments), capture-live exit 0, desktop+mobile PNGs visually inspected (hostile monitor row and world-bible title confirmed on desktop; title and layout confirmed on mobile).

DET6-DOC: coordination brief gained the Cycle 006 section (line 63) and llm-wiki gained the cycle-006 design-alignment report plus index line; sprites unit_disrupt.png (170x256, 60KB, faces right) and unit_voidspawn.png (256x256, 107KB, faces left) generated via gti with style references.

All hostile/disruptor lane behavior is cosmetic presentation of already-resolved deterministic outcomes; game-core.js is byte-identical this cycle, no new command path exists, and cycle-004/005 records remain immutable.

assumptions.statement: Telegraph arrival speed 100/foeCooldown %/s stays legible at stage 5's 2.5s cooldown (40 %/s march).
assumptions.validation_boundary: If playtesting shows stage-5 telegraphs feel unreadable, tune only the presentation constants in app.js under a new directive; never compensate in game-core.js.

assumptions.statement: unit_voidspawn.png's square 1:1 aspect renders undistorted via object-fit:contain in the lane.
assumptions.validation_boundary: If a future sprite regeneration restores 2:3 portrait aspect, no code change is required; keep object-fit:contain.

next_action.scope: vox-director cutscene generation with compresso compression budget review, APK (TWA/Capacitor) packaging survey, and stage-5 telegraph readability playtest follow-up
prohibited_work: game-core.js reducer semantic changes without a new directive
